title: tillandsia incurvata
intro:
Tillandsia incurvata, also known as the "Purple Vase Plant", is a species of epiphytic bromeliad, a type of air plant that obtains moisture and nutrients from the air rather than through a root system.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in folk remedies in Central America, where it is believed to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects.

The health benefits of Tillandsia incurvata are thought to include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation.

In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the leaves and flowers being harvested and dried for medicinal use.
